name: Mashed Potato Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 1 1/2 teaspoons Salt.
2. Mash potatoes and combine with the mixture.
The recipe is from a cookbook I have on Amish and Mennonite cooking. It calls for a pinch of saffron, but because of the high cost of this spice, it is often omitted when making this recipe.
3. Melt butter in a large bowl. Add celery and onion, and cook until tender.
4. Pour over bread cubes and mix well.
5. Combine saffron (if using) and boiling water. Add to the bread and mix well.
6. Add remaining ingredients to bread, mixing well after each addition. The finished product should be very moist. If necessary, add more milk.
7. Transfer into 2 well-greased casserole dishes or one 9x13 pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
